roles.title: Technical Lead — Frontend
roles.summary: Leading the security vertical end-to-end, from the landing page to advanced user-security options. Mentoring the team toward precise decisions, confidence and a clean codebase that maximizes business value.

roles.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
roles.summary: Senior frontend engineering on Openbank's security module.

roles.title: Technical Lead
roles.summary: Technical leadership of the development team.

roles.title: Software Developer — Web UI (Client: LATAM Airlines)
roles.summary: Built accessible, smooth experiences with React + Next.js for LATAM Airlines. Used a BFF to map backend services into exactly the APIs the frontend needed.

roles.title: Full Stack Software Developer
roles.summary: Defined and maintained cloud architecture on AWS; built REST APIs with Ruby on Rails and rich user experiences with React.

roles.title: Software Architect (R&D)
roles.summary: Owned the technology roadmap of the software factory. Built microservices, serverless and frontends (Angular, React) with Docker & Kubernetes for clients like Sodimac and Falabella. Led the dev team across Angular, React, Node.js and Spring.

roles.title: Full-Stack Software Developer
roles.summary: Platform for business in movement, delivered on Android, iOS and Web using Kotlin, Java, Swift and Ruby on Rails.

roles.title: Full-Stack Software Developer
roles.summary: Consultancy and software development for micro and macro businesses: Java 8 / Spring Boot and Ruby on Rails backends, React and Angular frontends, and Kotlin / Swift / React Native mobile apps.

roles.title: Full-Stack Software Developer & Consultant
roles.summary: Full-stack solutions for a major Chilean retailer with Java EE and Vaadin across logistics, commercial and finance. Built EJB microservices exposed via web services, DB2/Postgres reporting, JMS with ActiveMQ and RoR APIs; deployed with OpenShift, Ansible, Sonar and Jenkins.

roles.title: Full-Stack Web & Android Developer
roles.summary: Innovative software solutions for Chilean clients: Android with Kotlin/Java, Ruby on Rails APIs and admin dashboards, and React Native apps for Android and iOS.

roles.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
roles.summary: Web software for maintenance, installation and back-office automation (Ruby on Rails) plus Android apps for client companies.

roles.title: Android & Blockchain Developer
roles.summary: Fermat is a peer-to-peer economy framework running on smartphones. Designed and implemented low-level plugins: Token external API, P2P Jobs backend and Android, HTTPS/binary requests, async tasks, and the Fermat transaction & Linux installer.
